headline: Bunge (BG) Stock Still Looks Undervalued After A 78% Run
summary: Bunge Global has delivered a 77.7% total return over the past 5 years, yet its valuation checks offer a more mixed picture that sits between clear bargain and clear expensiveness. Over 5 years, a 77.7% return suggests Bunge Global has already rewarded patient shareholders, so the current price builds on a strong run rather than a recent slump. Optimism around higher earnings expectations can support the current valuation, but any disappointment against those raised expectations may weigh on...

headline: Why Bunge Global (BG) Is Up 7.4% After Analysts Lift Earnings Outlook - And What's Next
summary: Recently, Bunge Global (BG) was upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) after analysts raised their full-year earnings estimates by 17.4% over the past three months, signaling stronger confidence in its profit outlook. This shift in analyst sentiment highlights that improving earnings expectations, rather than operational announcements, are currently shaping how the market views Bunge’s business prospects. We’ll now examine how this upgraded earnings outlook and stronger analyst sentiment may...
